subject: FW: Bluebeards Castle
body:

To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Bluebeards Castle

 

You've Received a Webcam Image from Yacht Haven Grande.

Camera. 

	From: afarkas@islecap.com 
To: lesley@nysgllc.com 
Message:
Yacht Haven Grande; Image from Jan 29, 2008 1:31 PM
Happy Tuesday.

NOTE: To save the image embedded in this email, right-click the image
and click "Save Picture As...". Name the picture, select where you want
to save it, and it will be saved as a bitmap (.BMP). 

	
	

If you have any problems viewing the image, email EarthCam
<http://www.earthcam.net/support/contactus.php> .
